programs.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programs.desc: (M) Dismissed by police, Abby is convinced she's found her daughter's abductor. She takes matters into her own hands, revealing the shocking truth about her daughter's fate.

programs.title: His Perfect Obsession
programs.desc: (M) Allison returns to her hometown with her visually impaired daughter after her aunt's death. There, she encounters a former teenage colleague with a dangerous obsession for her.
